problem: Positive integers x,y,z satisfy 3x+4y+4z=113, 3x+3y+2z=78, and 4x+2y+4z=114. Find x+y+z.
Add the differences of consecutive cubes 2³-1³, 4³-3³, ..., 12³-11³.
Take the three smallest integers (by value) with exactly 4 divisors as a box's dimensions. What is the square of its space diagonal?
For a 12-sided die, what is the least roll count making the probability of at least one specified face exceed 1/2?
Count the complex numbers z with z^7 equal to its own conjugate.
How much is the combined total of a+b across all pairs of positive integers a≤b where a²+b²=325?
How many integers between 1000 and 1999 (inclusive of 1000) have a digit sum of 19?
Count the divisors of 660 that are greater than 10.
Of the divisors of 540, how many are greater than 20?
How many size-3 subsets of {1..12} have sum ≡ 2 mod 5?
Evaluate the nested fraction 6+1/(6+1/(...)) with 3 total 6's as m/n irreducible; report m+n.
Write the continued fraction with 5 levels of 5 (i.e. 5+1/(5+1/(...))) as a reduced fraction m/n; find m+n.
How many right triangles with whole-number sides have hypotenuse no more than 30?
Define x⊕y = x+y+xy for all integers. What is ((3⊕10)⊕4)⊕8?
Find the total of the even positive divisors of 868.
To equalize 3 glasses (2 full, one 1/4 full), you pour m/n of a glass from each full one. Find m+n in lowest terms.
Count the integers in [1,427] divisible by at least one of 3, 4, 5.
How many integers from 1 to 355 are divisible by 3, 4, or 5?
How many integers from 1 to 602 are divisible by 3, 4, or 5?
Find the number of integer points (x,y) with x²+y² ≤ 9.
For some positive integer n, lcm(n,45) equals 11115 and gcd(n,15) equals 1. What is the least possible n?
The least common multiple of n and 36 is 4356; the greatest common divisor of n and 15 is 1. Find the smallest n.
Find the smallest positive integer n with lcm(n,18)=360 and gcd(n,15)=5.
Evaluate log base 3 of 14348907, plus log base 3 of 4782969, minus log base 3 of 729.
9^14 is divided by 169. What is the remainder?
Find 8^9 mod 115.
Count perfect squares below 2231 that are multiples of 9 and whose last digit is 1.
Count perfect squares below 3417 that are multiples of 4 and whose last digit is 4.
In how many ways can 16 be written as a+b+c with 0≤a<b<c (integers)?
Find the number of perfect squares below 8667 that are multiples of 16.
A positive integer x satisfies 5x³ -1x² +0x -4 = 596. What is x?
P(x)=∏(x-i)^(m_i) for i=1..7 with m=[4, 3, 3, 1, 4, 4, 2]. On how many of the 8 open intervals is P positive?
The polynomial P(x)=(x-1)^4·(x-2)^2·(x-3)^3·(x-4)^3·(x-5)^3·(x-6)^4 has its roots removed from the number line, leaving 7 open intervals. On how many is P(x) positive?
The polynomial P(x)=(x-1)^4·(x-2)^2·(x-3)^3·(x-4)^2·(x-5)^3·(x-6)^3·(x-7)^4 has its roots removed from the number line, leaving 8 open intervals. On how many is P(x) positive?
A complex number is both an 12th and an 16th root of unity. How many such numbers exist?
The 6th roots of unity and the 15th roots of unity share how many common values?
The 24th roots of unity and the 12th roots of unity share how many common values?
Compute 1/(1·4)+...+1/(14·17) as m/n in lowest terms; what is m+n?
The series sum of 1/(k(k+2)), k up to 13, equals m/n reduced. Find m+n.
Among triangular numbers below 1533, how many are multiples of 2?
Count the triangular numbers under 5115 that are divisible by 2.
How many of the triangular numbers less than 950 are divisible by 3?
